name: Splice Machine
description: Feature store and SQL-compatible data platform that unifies OLTP, OLAP and ML on a single distributed engine.

seo.title: Splice Machine — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Splice Machine: Feature store and SQL-compatible data platform that unifies OLTP, OLAP and ML on a single distributed engine.

when_to_use: Running ML predictions against a live OLTP database in real time
Building real-time feature stores on top of operational data
Combining SQL analytics with in-database ML for low-latency scoring
Deploying ML models that query live transactional data directly

pros: OLTP, OLAP and ML on one engine
Feature store included for ML teams
cons: Unified engines often lose to specialists
review.verdict: Ambitious convergence story, but in 2026 most teams are better served gluing best-of-breed warehouses and feature stores.
review.best_for: Niche teams that genuinely need HTAP plus ML on one stack
review.not_for: Most data teams — Snowflake, Databricks or Feast will serve better

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
